case_title: CHIEM, CYNTHIA et al VS GREEN, SUSAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CHIEM, CYNTHIA BUSTAMI, KARIM AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DUE DILIGENCE BY SHERIFF'S DEPT. UNABLE TO ATTEMPT SERVICE ISSUED TO: CYNTHIA CHIEM, TIME EXPIRED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY ATTORNEY OF RESPONDENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEM, CYNTHIA BUSTAMI, KARIM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHIEM, CYNTHIA GREEN, SUSAN JUDGMENT FOR SUSAN GREEN, RESPONDANT IN SCA 28267 269.88. EACH SIDE BEING OWN OWN FEES AND COSTS OF ORIGINAL SUIT, COURT FIND THE EACH PARTY IS 50% AT FAULT. CHIEM'S DAMAGES WERE $1057.23 AND GREEN' WERE $1596.88. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO SUSAN COWAN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GREEN, SUSAN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BUSTAMI, KARIM $1,047.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,155.00, THE COURT DETERMINES CROSS-COMPLAINANT SUSAN GREEN DAMAGES TO BE $1396 AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO CROSS PLAINTIFF GREEN. THE JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT FOR SUSAN GREEN, RESPONDANT IN SCA 28267 269.88. EACH SIDE BEING OWN OWN FEES AND COSTS OF ORIGINAL SUIT, COURT FIND THE EACH PARTY IS 50% AT FAULT. CHIEM'S DAMAGES WERE $1057.23 AND GREEN' WERE $1596.88.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY GREEN, SUSAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHIEM, CYNTHIA BUSTAMI, KARIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSTAMI, KARIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, SUSAN $244.31 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $284.31, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $977.23 AND ATTRIBUTES 75% FAULT TO DRIVER CYNTHIA CHIEM & 25% TO DEFENDANT SUSAN GREEN. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. PLFT CYNTHIA CHIEM IS DISMISSED AS A PLAINTIFF, BECAUSE SHE DID NOT HAVE AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BUSTAMI, KARIM
